amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 28 — paragraph 1 — point b a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 28 — paragraph 1 — point b a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission



(b a)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

(b a) they make a substantial modification to an AI system, including a general purpose AI system, which has not been classified as high-risk and has already been placed on the market or put into service in such manner that the AI system becomes a high risk AI system in accordance with Article 6

they make a substantial modification to an AI system, including a general purpose AI system, which has not been classified as high-risk and has already been placed on the market or put into service in such manner that the AI system becomes a high risk AI system in accordance with Article 6
